Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Implement Walking Skeleton \(Stories 1.1, 1.2, 1.3\)

Add basic grocery list with check-off functionality and local persistence:
- GroceryList component displaying hardcoded items \(Milk, Eggs, Bread\)
- Tap to toggle check state with strikethrough styling
- Persist checked items to AsyncStorage

Uses "Testing Without Mocks" pattern with nullable infrastructure wrapper
for CheckedItemsStorage, enabling clean dependency injection in tests.

Also adds problem analysis and user stories documentation for Milestone 1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
